prophecies.q: 无人机战争与自动化武器
prophecies.a:
未来的战争将由自主运行的无人武器系统主导，机器可以在没有人类直接操控的情况下自行决定攻击目标。
——《变量人》(1953)、《第二类》(1953)
prophecies.a_en:
Future wars will be dominated by autonomous unmanned weapon systems; machines will independently decide attack targets without direct human control.
— The Variable Man (1953), Second Variety (1953)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年代起，无人机成为现代战争的核心武器。美国MQ-9「死神」无人机在中东广泛使用。2020年利比亚冲突中，土耳其Kargu-2无人机据报在未经人类指令的情况下自主攻击目标，成为首例自主致命武器实战案例。2022年俄乌战争中无人机使用达到前所未有的规模。
prophecies.verdict_en: From the 2010s, drones became core weapons in modern warfare. US MQ-9 Reaper drones were extensively used in the Middle East. In the 2020 Libyan conflict, Turkish Kargu-2 drones reportedly autonomously engaged targets without human command, marking the first autonomous lethal weapon combat use. Drone usage reached unprecedented scale in the 2022 Russia-Ukraine war.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a: 迪克的作品中描绘了无人驾驶的小型机器人在城市中自动完成配送任务，将包裹和物资送到指定地点。
prophecies.a_en: Dick's works depicted small unmanned robots autonomously completing delivery tasks in cities, bringing packages and supplies to designated locations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代自主配送已成为现实：Starship Technologies的配送机器人在美国大学校园运营，亚马逊Scout在社区配送，京东和美团在中国测试无人配送车。但大规模普及仍面临法规和技术挑战。
prophecies.verdict_en: Autonomous delivery became reality in the 2020s: Starship Technologies robots operate on US college campuses, Amazon Scout delivers in communities, JD.com and Meituan test delivery robots in China. But large-scale adoption still faces regulatory and technical challenges.
prophecies.yearReason: 迪克1950年代描述的自主配送机器人在2020年代开始商业化运营
prophecies.yearReason_en: Dick's 1950s autonomous delivery robots began commercial operation in the 2020s

prophecies.a:
政府将利用预测技术在犯罪发生之前逮捕「未来的罪犯」，执法从事后惩罚转变为事前干预。
——《少数派报告》(1956)
prophecies.a_en:
Governments will use predictive technology to arrest 'future criminals' before crimes occur, shifting law enforcement from punishment to preemptive intervention.
— The Minority Report (1956)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年起，美国多个城市部署PredPol（现Geolitica）等预测性执法系统，利用算法预测犯罪热点地区并提前部署警力。洛杉矶、芝加哥等城市大规模使用。虽未达到小说中「逮捕未来罪犯」的程度，但预测性执法的逻辑与迪克的构想高度一致。2020年代后因种族偏见争议，多个城市开始限制或停用此类系统。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 2012 onward, multiple US cities deployed PredPol (now Geolitica) and other predictive policing systems, using algorithms to forecast crime hotspots and preemptively deploy officers. Los Angeles, Chicago, and other cities used them extensively. While not reaching the novel's level of arresting 'future criminals,' the logic of predictive policing closely matches Dick's vision. After racial bias controversies in the 2020s, several cities began restricting or discontinuing these systems.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
广告将不再是面向大众的统一内容，而是根据个人身份、行为和偏好进行精准定向投放，广告会认识你、叫你的名字、追踪你的行踪。
——《少数派报告》(1956)、《尤比克》(1969)
prophecies.a_en:
Advertising will no longer be uniform mass content but precisely targeted based on individual identity, behavior, and preferences — ads will know you, call your name, and track your movements.
— The Minority Report (1956), Ubik (1969)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年代起，Google、Facebook等科技公司构建了基于用户行为追踪的精准广告系统。广告根据用户搜索历史、位置数据、社交关系和消费记录进行个性化投放。2018年Cambridge Analytica丑闻揭示了个人数据被大规模用于定向内容投放的现实，与迪克描绘的「认识你的广告」极为相似。
prophecies.verdict_en: From the 2010s onward, Google, Facebook, and other tech companies built precision advertising systems based on user behavior tracking. Ads are personalized using search history, location data, social connections, and purchase records. The 2018 Cambridge Analytica scandal revealed how personal data was used for mass-targeted content delivery, remarkably similar to Dick's vision of 'ads that know you.'
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a: 迪克的多部作品中描绘了政府利用先进技术监控每一个公民的日常生活和思想。「预罪」系统甚至在犯罪发生前就逮捕嫌疑人。（《少数派报告》等）
prophecies.a_en: Dick's works depict governments using advanced technology to monitor every citizen's daily life and thoughts. 'Precrime' systems even arrest suspects before crimes occur. (Minority Report, etc.)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年斯诺登揭露NSA全球监控计划，证实了政府大规模监控的存在。中国的天网/雪亮工程实现了城市级视频监控覆盖。预测性警务（predictive policing）已在多个城市试点，与「预罪」概念有相似之处。
prophecies.verdict_en: Snowden's 2013 NSA revelations confirmed government mass surveillance. China's Skynet/Sharp Eyes project achieved city-level video surveillance coverage. Predictive policing has been piloted in multiple cities, resembling the 'precrime' concept.
prophecies.yearReason: 迪克1956年描述的大规模监控在2013年棱镜门后被证实在现实中存在
prophecies.yearReason_en: Dick's 1956 mass surveillance depiction was confirmed to exist in reality after the 2013 PRISM revelations

prophecies.a:
我们所经验的「现实」可能并非真实存在，而是某种更高层次智能体运行的模拟程序。时间本身可能是一种幻觉，人类可能被困在一个不断循环的模拟世界中。
——《VALIS》(1981)、《时间脱节》(1959)
prophecies.a_en:
The 'reality' we experience may not truly exist but be a simulation run by some higher intelligence. Time itself may be an illusion, and humanity may be trapped in an endlessly looping simulated world.
— VALIS (1981), Time Out of Joint (1959)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2003年哲学家Nick Bostrom发表「模拟假说」论文，引发学术界广泛讨论。2016年Elon Musk公开表示「我们生活在真实世界的概率只有十亿分之一」。物理学家和计算机科学家持续探索宇宙是否为模拟的可能性。虽然模拟假说无法被证实或证伪，但迪克在1959年便构想了这一概念，远早于学术界的系统性讨论。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2003, philosopher Nick Bostrom published the 'Simulation Hypothesis' paper, sparking widespread academic discussion. In 2016, Elon Musk publicly stated 'the odds we're in base reality is one in billions.' Physicists and computer scientists continue exploring whether the universe could be a simulation. While the simulation hypothesis can be neither proved nor disproved, Dick conceived this concept in 1959, decades before systematic academic discussion.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.q: 平行历史与替代现实政治
prophecies.a:
在另一条历史线上，轴心国赢得了第二次世界大战，美国被德国和日本分区占领。历史并非固定不变，现实可能只是众多平行世界中的一个版本。
——《高堡奇人》(1962)
prophecies.q_en: Alternate history and alternative reality politics
prophecies.a_en:
In an alternate timeline, the Axis powers won World War II, and America was divided between German and Japanese occupation. History is not fixed — reality may be just one version among many parallel worlds.
— The Man in the High Castle (1962)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然平行宇宙理论仍是物理学前沿猜想（多世界诠释），但迪克对「替代现实」的文学探索深刻影响了当代文化。2015-2019年Amazon改编的《高堡奇人》电视剧引发全球关注，「平行历史」成为流行文化常见主题。2020年代「后真相」时代中，不同政治群体生活在各自的「替代现实」中，与迪克描绘的多重现实共存有某种隐喻性的呼应。
prophecies.verdict_en: While parallel universe theory remains a frontier physics hypothesis (many-worlds interpretation), Dick's literary exploration of 'alternate reality' profoundly influenced contemporary culture. The 2015-2019 Amazon adaptation of The Man in the High Castle drew global attention, making 'alternate history' a popular culture staple. In the 2020s 'post-truth' era, different political groups living in their own 'alternate realities' metaphorically echoes Dick's depiction of coexisting multiple realities.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a: 人类通过虚拟现实设备逃入一个比现实更美好的幻境。在那里他们可以成为任何人，拥有任何东西。真实与虚假的界限逐渐模糊。（多部作品）
prophecies.a_en: Humans escape into virtual reality environments better than reality. There they can be anyone and have anything. The boundary between real and fake gradually blurs. (Multiple works)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代VR游戏（VRChat、Beat Saber）和元宇宙概念（Meta/Facebook改名）使虚拟逃避主义成为现实。数百万人在虚拟世界中社交、工作、娱乐。但技术仍未达到迪克描述的完全沉浸式、难辨真假的水平。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, VR gaming (VRChat, Beat Saber) and metaverse concepts (Meta/Facebook rebrand) made virtual escapism reality. Millions socialize, work, and play in virtual worlds. But technology hasn't reached Dick's fully immersive, reality-indistinguishable level.
prophecies.yearReason: 迪克描述的虚拟现实逃避主义在2020年代元宇宙热潮中部分实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Dick's VR escapism was partially realized in the 2020s metaverse trend

prophecies.a:
人类将能够进入完全沉浸式的虚拟世界，在其中体验另一种生活，甚至无法区分虚拟与现实的边界。药物和技术的结合将使人困在多层嵌套的幻觉之中。
——《帕尔默·艾尔德里奇的三处圣痕》(1965)、《VALIS》(1981)
prophecies.a_en:
Humans will be able to enter fully immersive virtual worlds, living alternate lives and losing the ability to distinguish virtual from real. The combination of drugs and technology will trap people in nested layers of illusion.
— The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch (1965), VALIS (1981)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年Oculus Rift、HTC Vive等消费级VR设备上市，虚拟现实进入大众市场。2021年Facebook更名Meta，宣布全力投入「元宇宙」建设。2023年Apple Vision Pro发布，混合现实技术进一步模糊虚拟与现实的界限。虽尚未达到小说中「无法区分现实」的程度，但技术方向与迪克的构想完全吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2016, consumer VR devices like Oculus Rift and HTC Vive launched, bringing virtual reality to the mass market. In 2021, Facebook rebranded to Meta, committing to building the 'metaverse.' In 2023, Apple Vision Pro launched, further blurring the virtual-real boundary. While not yet reaching the novel's level of 'indistinguishable reality,' the technological direction perfectly matches Dick's vision.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
大型企业集团将逐步取代传统政府的权力，成为社会的实际统治者。企业将控制法律、经济和公民生活的方方面面。
——《VALIS》(1981)、《帕尔默·艾尔德里奇的三处圣痕》(1965)
prophecies.a_en:
Large corporate conglomerates will gradually replace traditional government power, becoming the real rulers of society. Corporations will control law, economy, and every aspect of civilian life.
— VALIS (1981), The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch (1965)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代，科技巨头（Google、Apple、Meta、Amazon、Microsoft）的市值和影响力超越许多国家的GDP。这些公司控制着全球通信基础设施、信息流通和数字经济。2021年Facebook能够封禁一国总统的社交媒体账号，展现了企业权力对政治的直接影响。但传统政府仍保有立法和军事权力，企业尚未完全取代政府。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, tech giants (Google, Apple, Meta, Amazon, Microsoft) exceeded many nations' GDP in market cap and influence, controlling global communications infrastructure, information flow, and the digital economy. In 2021, Facebook's ability to ban a sitting president's social media demonstrated corporate power's direct political impact. However, traditional governments retain legislative and military power; corporations have not fully replaced governments.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
未来社会将通过精神药物大规模控制人口的情绪和行为。处方药物将不仅治疗疾病，更被用于调节社会秩序，使人变得顺从和可控。
——《帕尔默·艾尔德里奇的三处圣痕》(1965)、《暗黑扫描仪》(1977)
prophecies.a_en:
Future society will control population mood and behavior through mass psychopharmaceuticals. Prescription drugs will not only treat illness but regulate social order, making people compliant and controllable.
— The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch (1965), A Scanner Darkly (1977)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年前后，美国阿片类药物危机达到高峰，制药公司Purdue Pharma被揭露通过虚假营销推动OxyContin滥用，导致数十万人死亡。抗抑郁药（SSRIs）在全球范围内大规模使用，美国成年人中约13%长期服用。ADHD药物（如Adderall）在学生和职场人群中广泛滥用。虽非政府刻意控制，但药物对社会行为的大规模影响与迪克的描绘有显著相似之处。
prophecies.verdict_en: Around 2015, the US opioid crisis peaked, with Purdue Pharma exposed for marketing OxyContin through deceptive practices, causing hundreds of thousands of deaths. Antidepressants (SSRIs) were prescribed globally, with ~13% of US adults on long-term use. ADHD medications (like Adderall) were widely misused among students and professionals. While not deliberate government control, the mass impact of pharmaceuticals on social behavior bears significant resemblance to Dick's depictions.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
传统货币将被数字化的替代物取代，经济交易将越来越多地在虚拟层面完成。商品的「真实性」将不再重要，人们为虚拟体验付费将成为常态。
——《尤比克》(1969)、《帕尔默·艾尔德里奇的三处圣痕》(1965)
prophecies.a_en:
Traditional currency will be replaced by digital alternatives; economic transactions will increasingly occur on virtual planes. The 'authenticity' of goods will no longer matter; paying for virtual experiences will become normal.
— Ubik (1969), The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch (1965)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年比特币诞生，2021年加密货币市场总值突破3万亿美元。NFT数字艺术品以数百万美元成交。游戏内虚拟物品交易形成千亿美元规模的市场。中国推出数字人民币（e-CNY），多国央行研发数字货币（CBDC）。虚拟物品和数字体验的商业化已成为现实经济的重要组成部分。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bitcoin was created in 2009; by 2021, the cryptocurrency market cap exceeded $3 trillion. NFT digital artworks sold for millions. In-game virtual item trading formed a hundred-billion-dollar market. China launched the digital yuan (e-CNY), and multiple central banks developed digital currencies (CBDCs). The commercialization of virtual goods and digital experiences has become a major part of the real economy.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
未来的技术将能够删除、修改或植入人类的记忆，使人无法确定自己的记忆是否真实。记忆将成为一种可以买卖的商品。
——《我们能为您批量回忆》(1966)
prophecies.a_en:
Future technology will be able to delete, modify, or implant human memories, leaving people unable to determine if their memories are real. Memory will become a commodity to be bought and sold.
— We Can Remember It for You Wholesale (1966)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年MIT利根川进教授团队通过光遗传学技术在小鼠大脑中成功植入虚假记忆（发表于Science）。2020年代，Neuralink等脑机接口公司推进人脑植入设备。PTSD治疗中的记忆消退疗法（如propranolol辅助）已进入临床应用。但完整的人类记忆篡改和植入技术尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2014, MIT Professor Susumu Tonegawa's team successfully implanted false memories in mice using optogenetics (published in Science). In the 2020s, Neuralink and other BCI companies advanced brain implant devices. Memory reconsolidation therapy for PTSD (e.g., propranolol-assisted) entered clinical use. However, complete human memory manipulation and implantation technology has not yet been achieved.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a: 人类的记忆可以被植入、删除或修改。你以为自己经历过的事情可能从未发生，你真正的记忆可能已被替换。（《全面回忆》《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》等）
prophecies.a_en: Human memories can be implanted, deleted, or modified. What you think you experienced may never have happened; your real memories may have been replaced. (Total Recall, Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?, etc.)
prophecies.yearReason: 迪克1966年描述的记忆操控技术尚处于早期神经科学研究阶段
prophecies.yearReason_en: Dick's 1966 memory manipulation technology remains in early neuroscience research stages

prophecies.a:
在未来，仿生人将拥有近乎人类的智能与情感，人类社会将因此陷入一场关于机器是否拥有意识和权利的持续辩论。
——《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》(1968)
prophecies.q_en: Androids and the AI consciousness debate
prophecies.a_en:
In the future, androids will possess near-human intelligence and emotions, plunging society into an ongoing debate about whether machines can have consciousness and rights.
— Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? (1968)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代，AI意识与权利问题成为全球热点。2022年Google工程师Blake Lemoine公开声称LaMDA聊天机器人具有意识，引发广泛辩论。各国政府和学术机构纷纷成立AI伦理委员会，讨论AI系统的道德地位。欧盟《人工智能法案》(2024年)直接涉及AI系统的权利和限制问题。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, AI consciousness and rights became global hot topics. In 2022, Google engineer Blake Lemoine publicly claimed the LaMDA chatbot was sentient, sparking widespread debate. Governments and academic institutions worldwide established AI ethics committees to discuss the moral status of AI systems. The EU AI Act (2024) directly addresses AI system rights and restrictions.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
未来将出现难以区分真假的合成影像和声音，任何人的面孔和声音都可以被完美复制，用于欺骗和操纵。真实与伪造之间的界限将彻底模糊。
——《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》(1968)、《尤比克》(1969)
prophecies.a_en:
The future will see synthetic images and sounds indistinguishable from reality; anyone's face and voice can be perfectly replicated for deception and manipulation. The line between real and fake will completely blur.
— Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? (1968), Ubik (1969)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2017年「deepfake」一词首次出现在Reddit上。2018年起，基于GAN和后来的扩散模型的深度伪造技术迅速发展。2024年，AI生成的虚假视频已被用于政治选举干预、金融诈骗和虚假信息传播。OpenAI的Sora、Midjourney等工具使合成媒体制作门槛极低。各国政府紧急立法应对深度伪造威胁。
prophecies.verdict_en: The term 'deepfake' first appeared on Reddit in 2017. From 2018, deepfake technology based on GANs and later diffusion models advanced rapidly. By 2024, AI-generated fake videos were used in political election interference, financial fraud, and disinformation. Tools like OpenAI's Sora and Midjourney made synthetic media extremely accessible. Governments worldwide rushed to legislate against deepfake threats.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
未来将出现外表和行为完全模仿人类的合成生命体，需要复杂的心理测试才能将其与真人区分。「人性」的定义将因此被永久改写。
——《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》(1968)
prophecies.q_en: Synthetic humans and the Turing test
prophecies.a_en:
The future will see synthetic beings that perfectly mimic human appearance and behavior, requiring complex psychological tests to distinguish them from real people. The definition of 'humanity' will be permanently rewritten.
— Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? (1968)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年起，GPT-4、Claude等大型语言模型在文字对话中多次通过非正式图灵测试。2024年研究显示AI在盲测中被多数参与者误判为人类。但物理仿真人类（如小说中的仿生人）尚未出现。Boston Dynamics等公司的人形机器人在运动能力上取得突破，但外观仍明显非人。AI在语言层面的「通过测试」与物理层面的差距仍然显著。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 2023, large language models like GPT-4 and Claude repeatedly passed informal Turing tests in text conversations. 2024 studies showed AI was misidentified as human by most participants in blind tests. However, physical synthetic humans (like the novel's androids) do not yet exist. Boston Dynamics' humanoid robots achieved breakthroughs in locomotion but remain visibly non-human. The gap between AI's linguistic 'passing' and physical replication remains significant.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.q: 社会信用与身份分级系统
prophecies.a:
未来社会将根据个人的行为记录和社会贡献对公民进行等级划分。低等级的人将被限制行动自由和社会权利，人的价值将被量化为一个数字。
——《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》(1968)、《高堡奇人》(1962)
prophecies.q_en: Social credit and identity ranking systems
prophecies.a_en:
Future society will rank citizens based on behavioral records and social contributions. Lower-ranked people will have restricted freedom of movement and social rights; human value will be quantified as a number.
— Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? (1968), The Man in the High Castle (1962)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年中国国务院发布社会信用体系建设规划纲要，2018年起在全国范围内逐步实施。失信被执行人被限制乘坐飞机和高铁。截至2023年，数百万人因社会信用评分受到出行限制。西方国家的信用评分系统（FICO等）虽性质不同，但同样将个人信用量化为数字，影响贷款、租房和就业机会。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2014, China's State Council published the Social Credit System construction plan, gradually implementing it nationwide from 2018. 'Dishonest' individuals were barred from flights and high-speed trains. By 2023, millions faced travel restrictions due to social credit scores. Western credit scoring systems (FICO, etc.), while different in nature, similarly quantify personal creditworthiness into numbers affecting loans, housing, and employment.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a: 在迪克的未来世界中，巨型企业（corporation）拥有比政府更大的权力，控制着经济、司法甚至军事力量。公民是企业的员工而非国家的公民。
prophecies.a_en: In Dick's future worlds, mega-corporations wield more power than governments, controlling economy, justice, and even military forces. Citizens are corporate employees rather than national citizens.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代科技巨头（苹果、谷歌、亚马逊、Meta）的市值超过多数国家GDP。它们控制信息流通（搜索引擎、社交媒体）、制定平台规则（事实上的法律），拥有私人太空计划。但主权国家仍保持核心治理权力。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, tech giants (Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta) have market caps exceeding most countries' GDP. They control information flow (search engines, social media), set platform rules (de facto laws), and run private space programs. But sovereign states still retain core governance power.
prophecies.yearReason: 迪克描述的企业权力超越政府在2020年代科技巨头的影响力中部分体现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Dick's corporations-over-governments vision partially materialized in 2020s tech giant influence

prophecies.a:
在信息极度泛滥的未来社会中，人们将无法分辨真假信息。官方叙事、个人经验和媒体报道之间的矛盾将导致集体性的认知危机。
——《尤比克》(1969)、《VALIS》(1981)
prophecies.q_en: Information overload and collapse of truth
prophecies.a_en:
In a future society of extreme information abundance, people will be unable to distinguish true from false information. Contradictions between official narratives, personal experience, and media reports will cause a collective epistemological crisis.
— Ubik (1969), VALIS (1981)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代「信息疫情」(infodemic)成为全球性问题。COVID-19期间虚假信息泛滥，WHO将其列为与疫情同等重要的威胁。社交媒体算法推荐系统加剧信息茧房效应，不同群体接收完全对立的「事实」。2024年AI生成内容的爆发进一步恶化了真假难辨的局面。牛津辞典2016年将「后真相」(post-truth)列为年度词汇。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, 'infodemic' became a global problem. During COVID-19, misinformation proliferated so severely that WHO classified it as a threat equal to the pandemic itself. Social media algorithms exacerbated filter bubbles, feeding different groups completely opposing 'facts.' The 2024 explosion of AI-generated content further worsened the truth-distinguishing crisis. Oxford Dictionaries named 'post-truth' as 2016 Word of the Year.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels

prophecies.a:
政府将对公民实施全方位监控，利用无处不在的监视设备记录每个人的一举一动。监控者自身也将被监控，形成一个无人能逃脱的监视网络。
——《暗黑扫描仪》(1977)
prophecies.a_en:
Governments will implement comprehensive surveillance of citizens, using ubiquitous monitoring devices to record everyone's every move. The watchers themselves will be watched, creating an inescapable surveillance network.
— A Scanner Darkly (1977)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年爱德华·斯诺登泄露的NSA文件揭示了美国政府对本国及全球公民实施的大规模监控项目（PRISM等）。中国的天网、雪亮工程等城市监控系统覆盖数亿摄像头。英国伦敦成为全球摄像头密度最高的城市之一。监控社会已成为21世纪的现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2013, Edward Snowden's leaked NSA documents revealed massive US government surveillance programs (PRISM, etc.) targeting domestic and global citizens. China's Skynet and Sharp Eyes projects cover hundreds of millions of cameras. London became one of the world's most surveilled cities. The surveillance society has become a 21st-century reality.
prophecies.yearReason: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philip K. Dick set this time period in his novels
